meaning: fractional orbit(al) bombardment system轨道轰炸系统
examples: I've asked her about it but she fobs me off.
Secure EZ-Prox CARDS, key fobs, or the company's keypads provide access.
They avoid specialisation and hierarchy by rotating the fobs so that everyone works at the more creative ones.
Companies are implanting bar code scanners in pens, key fobs, cell phones and pagers.
One of the few things virtually every FOBs has in common is onsite electric power generation.
